title: mertensia pubescens
intro: Mertensia pubescens, also known as Eastern Bluebells or Pulmonaria, is a perennial plant species in the family Boraginaceae, native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mertensia pubescens include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in salves and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
